hero.headline: HEADLINE - one strong promise
hero.subheadline: Clarifying line: who you help, what result, in how long or at what cost.

pains.title: Does this sound familiar?
pains.subtitle: The problems your clients come to you with

items.title: Pain 1
items.description: Describe a specific problem in the client's language. The more precise, the better.

items.title: Pain 2
items.description: Second pain. What's blocking them from moving forward right now?

items.title: Pain 3
items.description: Fear or risk. What are they afraid of if nothing changes?

solution.title: Our approach
solution.subtitle: Why it works
solution.description: Describe your methodology or unique approach. What's fundamentally different about you? What do you do differently?

audience.subtitle: We work with people who...

segments.title: Segment 1
segments.description: Describe a niche or client type. More specific is better.

segments.title: Segment 2
segments.description: Describe a niche or client type. More specific is better.

segments.title: Segment 3

notFor: Want one-off help without systematic work
Are not ready to invest in growth
Expect results without their own involvement

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Enquiry → call → understand the task and goals.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.description: Analyse the situation, identify growth opportunities.

steps.title: Execution
steps.description: Carry out the plan, keep you updated at every step.

steps.title: Results
steps.description: Record goal achievement and build the next roadmap together.

items.name: First Last
items.text: Client testimonial in their own words. The more specific the result, the more convincing. Add numbers or facts if available.

items.name: First Last
items.text: Second testimonial. Ideally from a different segment or with a different outcome.

items.name: First Last
items.text: Third testimonial. Different narratives increase credibility.

members.name: First Last
members.bio: 2-3 sentences: experience, expertise, why you can be trusted. A personal fact builds rapport.

items.question: How quickly will I see results?
items.answer: Answer honestly. Specific timelines beat vague promises.

items.question: How does the process work?
items.answer: Describe the format: online/offline, meeting frequency, communication.

items.question: What if it's not a fit?
items.answer: Refund policy or guarantees. Address the main objection.

items.question: How much time does it require from my side?
items.answer: Honest answer about the client's involvement.

finalCta.headline: Ready to get started?
finalCta.subheadline: Leave your details - we'll get back to you within an hour.
finalCta.note: No commitment. First consultation is free.
